areas.label: Economy & money
areas.synthesis: The INPC fell 0.27% from May. Annual inflation was 3.37%, down from 4.32% a year earlier.

headlines.title: Annual inflation falls to 3.37% in June
headlines.context: The INPC fell 0.27% from May. Annual inflation was 3.37%, down from 4.32% a year earlier.

areas.label: U.S.–Mexico
areas.synthesis: Mexico says it will seek criminal complaints over 17 deaths connected to ICE, 14 in custody and three during operations. It will also pursue civil action against private detention operators.

headlines.title: Mexico to file complaints over deaths connected to U.S. immigration enforcement
headlines.context: Mexico says it will seek criminal complaints over 17 deaths connected to ICE, 14 in custody and three during operations. It will also pursue civil action against private detention operators.

headlines.title: May U.S. goods deficit with Mexico widens to US$21.1bn
headlines.context: The U.S. goods deficit with Mexico was US$21.13bn in May, up from US$15.35bn in April.
